response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the 15-year experience requirement with ~20 years of software engineering and demonstrates recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure through MCP code generators at re:cinq. However, the role specifically requires recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI, and the resume shows minimal AI/ML product portfolio. Additionally, while he holds "Staff" titles, there's limited evidence of director-level technical leadership or strategic influence over major initiatives—the role demands someone who can advise customers on cutting-edge AI adoption and shape cloud product strategy, which his background doesn't clearly demonstrate.
strengths: Significantly exceeds 15-year requirement with 20 years across diverse technical domains (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure)
Currently contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, showing recent AI technology engagement
Strong full-stack foundation with cloud experience (AWS CDK, Docker, CI/CD) and demonstrated ability to architect platforms (GISCollective)
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field, and resume contains no evidence of AI/ML product expertise or frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, etc.)
Limited evidence of director-level technical leadership—career shows specialist IC roles and open-source founder work, but lacks demonstrated strategic influence or large-scale team leadership
No portfolio of recognized AI-powered products or platforms built with significant market impact, which is central to the role's requirement for 'demonstrated products or platforms built with AI'
